Magic Mike (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $113,721,571Details
International Box Office $56,828,182
Worldwide Box Office $170,549,753
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $37,921,674
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,873,371
Total $46,795,045
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mike is an entrepreneur. A man of many talents and loads of charm, he spends his days pursuing the American Dream from as many angles as he can handle: from roofing houses and detailing cars to designing furniture from his Tampa beach condo. But at night... he's just magic. The hot headliner in an all-male revue, Magic Mike has been rocking the stage at Club Xquisite for years with his original style and over-the-top dance moves. The more the ladies love him, the more they spend, and the happier that makes club owner Dallas. Seeing potential in a guy he calls the Kid, Mike takes the 19-year-old under his wing and schools him in the fine arts of dancing, partying, picking up women and making easy money. It's not long before the club's newest act has fans of his own, as the summer opens up to a world of fun, friendship and good times. Meanwhile, Mike meets the Kid's captivating sister, Brooke. She's definitely someone he'd like to know a lot better, and it looks like he has a chance...until his lifestyle gets in the way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,127,170 (34.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.91 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 24.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,930 opening theaters/3,120 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $170,868,095

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 29th, 2012 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
February 13th, 2022 (Special Engagement) by Iconic Releasing, released as Magic Mike: Galentine’s Day Event
International Releases: June 28th, 2012 (Wide) (Slovenia)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Latvia)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Lithuania)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Estonia)
July 5th, 2012 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: October 23rd, 2012 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for pervasive sexual content, brief graphic nudity, language and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2218, 4/11/2012)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Franchise: Magic Mike
Cast, crew, or production detail: Autobiographical, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Romance
Social setting: Strippers / Stripping
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Nick Wechsler, Gregory Jacobs, Iron Horse, Extension 765
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Mike is an entrepreneur. A man of many talents and loads of charm, he spends his days pursuing the American Dream from as many angles as he can handle: from roofing houses and detailing cars to designing furniture from his Tampa beach condo. But at night... he's just magic. The hot headliner in an all-male revue, Magic Mike has been rocking the stage at Club Xquisite for years with his original style and over-the-top dance moves. The more the ladies love him, the more they spend, and the happier that makes club owner Dallas. Seeing potential in a guy he calls the Kid, Mike takes the 19-year-old under his wing and schools him in the fine arts of dancing, partying, picking up women and making easy money. It's not long before the club's newest act has fans of his own, as the summer opens up to a world of fun, friendship and good times. Meanwhile, Mike meets the Kid's captivating sister, Brooke. She's definitely someone he'd like to know a lot better, and it looks like he has a chance...until his lifestyle gets in the way.
